entity_extraction_template:
Composite key columns: '_col_0' → '长期护理 （社会）' → '食物及饮用水质量控制' → '环境干预
（除与食物及饮用水有关）' → '_col_4' → '_col_5' → '_col_6' → '_col_7' → '_col_8' → '_col_9' → '_col_10' → '_col_11' → '_col_12' → '_col_13'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key '_col_0' → Col entity. Second-level key '长期护理 （社会）' → 长期护理__社会_ entity. Leaf key '_col_13' → 食物及饮用水质量控制 entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (Col) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (长期护理__社会_). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: .
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key '_col_0' defines the root entity (Col).
Second-level key '长期护理 （社会）' defines child entities (长期护理__社会_) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Leaf key '_col_13' defines the most granular entity (食物及饮用水质量控制).
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
